title: Misoptimization of case with string compares

features.name: case statement with string variable assignments in branches
features.description: Code should include a case statement with string variable assignment in multiple branches
features.snippet: logic [2:0] counter; string mystr; case (counter) 3'b000: mystr = "case-0"; 3'b001: mystr = "case-1"; 3'b010: mystr = "case-2"; default: mystr = "default"; endcase

features.name: default branch in case statement with string assignments
features.description: Code should include a default branch in a case statement with string assignments that triggers misoptimization
features.snippet: case (counter) 3'b000: mystr = "case-0"; 3'b001: mystr = "case-1"; default: mystr = "bad-default"; endcase

features.name: case statement without default branch with string assignments
features.description: Code should include a case statement with string assignments in branches without a default branch (works correctly)
features.snippet: logic [2:0] counter; string mystr; case (counter) 3'b000: mystr = "case-0"; 3'b001: mystr = "case-1"; 3'b010: mystr = "case-2"; endcase
